contact.title: Contact — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
contact.meta_description: Talk to us — send a message or reach out on WhatsApp. We're here for any question, partnership proposal, or wish to join.
contact.og_description: Talk to us — send a message or reach out on WhatsApp. We're here for any question, partnership proposal, or wish to join.
contact.hero_lead: Have a question, an idea, or simply a wish to join? We're here — choose the way that's easiest for you.
contact.chips_title: Choose and we'll fill it in automatically
contact.ph_subject: Choose a subject above or write here
contact.ph_message: Tell us about yourself and what interests you — we read everything.
contact.info_lang_title: We work in Hebrew and English
contact.info_lang_text: You're welcome to reach out in either language
contact.cta_text: Already know which path you belong to? Go straight to the join page.
